HGSS.681.0001:
Your Pokémon is so cute and adorable!
You love Pokémon just like I do!\f
Want to trade phone numbers?
Let’s chat! It’ll be so much fun![0200,0000]
HGSS.681.0002:
To be honest, I want a MARILL.
But I make do with my cute SNUBBULL.\f
Aw! I’m just kidding!
I’m just kidding, SNUBBULL! You’re the\r
cutest Pokémon ever, really!
HGSS.681.0004:
You have such cute and adorable
Pokémon with you! \f
We should totally trade phone
numbers, don’t you think?[0200,0000]
HGSS.681.0005:
Oh, sorry to keep you waiting,
[0103,0000,0000]. Here, I’ll give you this.\f
HGSS.681.0006:
Let’s see... You’re in the National
Park, aren’t you?\f
Well, you should come talk to me in
person, don’t you think?
HGSS.681.0007:
I spruced up my [0100,000A,0000] and made
it even cuter than before!\f
I happened to come across a wild
SNUBBULL recently.\f
My SNUBBULL, I assure you, was far
cuter than the wild one.\f
You can expect a call from me.
HGSS.681.0008:
I spruced up my [0100,000A,0000] and
made it even cuter than before!\f
I happened to see a wild MARILL the
other day. Or so I thought.\f
A closer look showed it was
[0100,000B,0000]. I was quite miffed.\f
You can expect a call from me.
HGSS.681.0009:
My husband got some Nuggets.\f
If you’d like, you could have one as
thanks for helping me out.\f
I’ll be at [0104,0003,0000].
Please come see me when you can.
HGSS.681.0010:
Pardon?
Oh, the Nugget?\f
It’s all right! There’s no need
to hurry. Come see me in\r
[0104,0003,0000] when you can.
HGSS.681.0011:
Are your Pokémon in prime form?
Let’s chat about Pokémon again.
